sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66469" key="mesonefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσο-νεφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n66469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with clouds</tr_> <pb n="1107" TEIform="pb"/> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the midst,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
